metrics.note: accuracy uses motion_anomaly_score threshold vs ground truth; not CNN accuracy.

interpretation.summary: motion_anomaly_score=0.3905 (threshold=0.5); pred_label=real from motion heuristic — not a CNN fake/real classifier.

signals.name: temporal_jitter

signals.name: spatial_inconsistency

signals.note: Flow directions are less coherent across the frame.

signals.name: flow_magnitude
signals.note: Average motion magnitude deviates from real-video baseline.
